title: Longevity Supplements for Women Over 40: The Evidence Guide
tags: longevity supplements, anti-aging women over 40, cellular health, autophagy

summary_html: The four best-evidenced longevity pathways for women over 40 are autophagy, telomere maintenance, mitophagy via urolithin A, and sirtuin activation via NAD+. This hub covers the evidence and links to deep-dive guides on each mechanism.
seo_title: Longevity Supplements for Women Over 40: What the Evidence Shows (2026)
seo_description: Which longevity supplements actually work for women over 40? This evidence guide covers autophagy, telomeres, urolithin A, and sirtuins — the four pathways with the strongest science.
